mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLicenses, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM issue_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW()) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM issue_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW()) THEN 1 END) AS newLicenses, SUM( CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN LICENSE_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS activeLicenses, COUNT( CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' AND expire_date >= NOW() AND expire_date < NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 1 END) AS expiringSoonLicenses FROM license

SELECT LICENSE_KEY AS licenseKey, TYPE AS licenseType, LICENSE_COUNT AS licenseCount, STATUS AS licenseStatus, EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate FROM LICENSE WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} ORDER BY EXPIRE_DATE DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT TYPE AS licenseType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM LICENSE WHERE TYPE IN ('STANDARD', 'PRO', 'ENTERPRISE') GROUP BY TYPE

SELECT c.CUST_NO AS custNo, c.CUST_NM AS custNm, l.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, l.LICENSE_KEY AS licenseKey, l.ISSUE_DATE AS issueDate, l.EXPIRE_DATE AS expiredDate, l.LICENSE_COUNT AS licenseCount, l.TYPE AS licenseType FROM LICENSE l JOIN CUSTOMER c ON c.CUST_NO=l.CUST_NO WHERE l.STATUS='EXPIRED' ORDER BY EXPIRE_DATE DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LICENSE WHERE STATUS = 'EXPIRED'
